documents.title: Auth Service Architecture & API Specification v3.2
documents.author: Elena Vance (Principal Identity Architect)
documents.content:
# Authentication Service Architecture & API Specification v3.2

## 1. Overview
The Authentication Service (`auth-svc`) is the authoritative identity provider for all internal and external AcmeAI applications. It implements OAuth 2.0 / OpenID Connect (OIDC) with mutual TLS (mTLS) between internal services and short-lived RSA-signed JWT tokens.

## 2. Ownership & SLA
- **Owning Team**: Identity & Access Management (IAM) Team
- **Lead Engineer**: Elena Vance (`elena.vance@acme.ai`)
- **On-Call Slack**: `#help-auth-svc`
- **Production SLA**: 99.99% availability

## 3. Dependent Services
- **Payments Service (`payment-svc`)**: Requires internal OAuth token exchange for billing ledger authorization.
- **API Gateway (`gateway-svc`)**: Performs JWT verification at the edge via Redis JWKS caching.
- **Customer Portal (`portal-web`)**: Uses OIDC Authorization Code Flow with PKCE.

## 4. Exposed APIs
- `POST /api/v1/auth/token`: Exchanges credentials or refresh token for JWT pair.
- `POST /api/v1/auth/verify`: Validates token claims and permissions.
- `GET /.well-known/jwks.json`: Public RSA verification keys.

## 5. Known Failure Modes
Refer to Support Ticket #INC-8834 regarding Redis session cache saturation during high-throughput burst events.

documents.title: Payments & Billing Platform Implementation Guide
documents.author: Marcus Chen (Staff Payments Engineer)
documents.content:
# Payments & Billing Platform (`payment-svc`) Implementation Guide

## 1. Architecture
The Payments Service handles subscription billing, usage metering, and invoice generation. It integrates directly with Stripe Enterprise and Stripe Tax.

## 2. Dependencies
- **Authentication Service (`auth-svc`)**: Every charge request must authenticate using a verified service token.
- **PostgreSQL Billing DB**: Highly durable ACID ledger cluster.

## 3. APIs Exposed
- `POST /api/v1/payments/charge`: Execute debit against customer billing method.
- `GET /api/v1/payments/invoices/{customer_id}`: List invoice history.

## 4. Runbook & Deployment
Deployments must run via ArgoCD blue/green pipelines (`deploy-payment-pipeline`).

documents.title: Enterprise Zero-Trust Security & mTLS Standard
documents.author: Sarah Jenkins (CISO Office)
documents.content:
# Zero-Trust Service-to-Service Communication Policy

All internal communication across AcmeAI Kubernetes clusters must enforce strict mTLS via Istio Service Mesh. Unauthenticated cleartext HTTP traffic is automatically dropped by edge sidecars.

documents.title: Incident Review #INC-8834: Authentication Failures During Flash Sale
documents.author: DevOps Incident Commander
documents.content:
# Incident Postmortem #INC-8834

## Summary
During the Q3 promotional flash sale, `auth-svc` experienced elevated 504 Gateway Timeout errors due to Redis connection pool exhaustion.

## Root Cause & Action Items
Redis connection pool limit was hardcoded to 50 connections. Upgraded `auth-svc` v3.2 to use dynamic pool sizing up to 500 connections.
